LAW AND MOTION 302, JUL-14-2023. HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SILVERADO POWER, LLC'S MOTION TO SETOFF. RULING - ARGUED. COUNSEL PRESENTED ORAL ARGUMENT TO SUPPORT THEIR POSITIONS REGARDING THE SUBJECT MOTION. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER SILVERADO POWER, LLC'S MOTION TO SETOFF IS STAYED PENDING RESOLUTION OF THE APPEAL IN MARTIFER-SILVERADO FUND I V. Notice Of Talesun Solar Usa Ltd.'S Motion To Compel Silverado Power To Provide Responses To Debtor Discovery
Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
This matter came on calendar for a motion to compel responses to debtor discovery, motion to stay enforcement of judgment and to quash debtor's exam on Nov-22-2024.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by Jeanine Farrell; CSR 7774; (415)472-2361; depos@westcoastreporters.net (D505)

Appearances by
Judgment Creditor Talesun Solar USA LTD represented by Hillary Weddell, Esq. and James O'Donnell, Esq.
Judgment Debtor Silverado Power, LLC represented by Celine G. Purcell, Esq., Josephine Patrick, Esq. and Rebecca Kutlow, Esq.

The Court provides a summary and discusses the motion before the court.
Judgment creditor offers proof to the motion.
Judgment debtor provides argument to the motion to stay the enforcement of judgment and the motion to quash debtor's examination.
The matters are discussed and argued.

Pursuant to CCP918.5, The Court exercises its discretion and the enforcement of judgment is stayed and the order of examination of judgment debtor Silverado Power, LLC set for November 22, 2024 at 11:00 a.m. in Dept. 505 is taken off calendar.

Notice Of Motion To Setoff; Motion To Setoff; And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff SILVERADO POWER, LLC's Motion to Setoff.

Appearances (via Zoom):

Martin S. Gattas, Esq., ONGARO PC, (415) 433-3900, for Plaintiff.

MATTHEW SCHECHTER, ESQ., McMANIS FAULKNER, (408) 279-8700, for Respondent.

Ruling - ARGUED. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the subject motion. The court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner Silverado Power, LLC's motion to setoff is stayed pending resolution of the appeal in Martifer-Silverado Fund I v. Talesun Solar USA, Ltd. Case No. CGC-16-556139.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow. Clerk: Robert Woods. Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, T: (925) 226-8222, E: raquel@transcriptlegal.com. (302/CK)
